mapper.insert:
SELECT EXAM.SEQ_EXAM_POLICY.nextval from dual
INSERT INTO EXAM_POLICY( TIME, TOTAL_SCORE, PASS_SCORE, EXAM_TIME_START, EXAM_TIME_END, SHOW_ANSWER, SHOW_SCORE, SAVE_PAGE, IS_UNIFY, MEMO, LAST_UPDATE_DATE, LAST_UPDATED_BY, CREATION_DATE, CREATED_BY, ENABLED_FLAG, PAPER_COUNT, GENERATE_CYCLE, TYPE, ID, NAME )VALUES( #{time,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{totalScore,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{passScore,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{examTimeStart,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{examTimeEnd,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{showAnswer,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{showScore,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{savePage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isUnify,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{memo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, SYSDATE, #{createdBy,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, 1 , #{paperCount,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{generateCycle,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{id,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update: UPDATE EXAM_POLICY SET TIME=#{time}, TOTAL_SCORE=#{totalScore}, PASS_SCORE=#{passScore,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, EXAM_TIME_START=#{examTimeStart}, EXAM_TIME_END=#{examTimeEnd}, SHOW_ANSWER=#{showAnswer}, SHOW_SCORE=#{showScore}, SAVE_PAGE=#{savePage}, IS_UNIFY=#{isUnify}, MEMO=#{memo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_UPDATED_BY=#{lastUpdatedBy}, LAST_UPDATE_DATE=SYSDATE, PAPER_COUNT=#{paperCount}, GENERATE_CYCLE=#{generateCycle}, TYPE=#{type}, NAME=#{name} WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE EXAM_POLICY SET ENABLED_FLAG=0 WHERE ID=#{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM EXAM_POLICY WHERE ENABLED_FLAG=1 AND GENERATE_CYCLE>0 AND TYPE='AUTO' AND EXAM_TIME_START<=SYSDATE AND EXAM_TIME_END>=SYSDATE
ORDER BY ID

SELECT EPY.ID, EPY.NAME, EPY.TIME, EPY.TOTAL_SCORE, EPY.PASS_SCORE, EPY.EXAM_TIME_START, EPY.EXAM_TIME_END, EPY.SHOW_ANSWER, EPY.SHOW_SCORE, EPY.SAVE_PAGE, EPY.IS_UNIFY, EPY.MEMO, EPY.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, EPY.LAST_UPDATED_BY, EPY.CREATION_DATE, EPY.CREATED_BY, EPY.ENABLED_FLAG, EPY.PAPER_COUNT, EPY.GENERATE_CYCLE, EPY.TYPE FROM EXAM_POLICY EPY, EXAM_PAPER EP WHERE EPY.ID=EP.EXAM_POLICY_ID AND EP.GUID=#{guid}
